name: Pickle and Par
about: Pickle and Par is a 22,000 square foot indoor facility located in Canutillo, Texas, featuring eight professional indoor pickleball courts and two golf bays equipped with Full Swing simulators. The venue provides a climate-controlled environment for year-round play, catering to both pickleball and golf enthusiasts with high-end courts and state-of-the-art simulation technology. It offers various services including open play, leagues, tournaments, and private lessons, designed for individuals, friends, and families to connect through sports.
why_golfers_like_it: Full Swing Golf simulators with industry-leading technology since 1993
Climate-controlled facility for consistent playing conditions
Private bay availability for focused practice and lessons

simulator_hardware.notes: Installed in two bays, with specific models not specified on the website

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, players are expected to bring their own golf clubs for use in the simulators.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The website does not specify a policy on outside food and drinks, so it is recommended to contact the venue directly for clarification.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not provide specific information on the duration for 18 holes, as it may vary based on simulator usage and player pace.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Pickle and Par offers memberships for juniors under 18 and family memberships, indicating a welcoming environment for younger players.
